name: Primary CTA
guideline: One primary CTA per hero; secondary action must be visually subordinate.

name: Empty State
guideline: Explain why it is empty and provide the next action.

name: Error State
column5: and tied to the field or action.

name: Loading State
guideline: Use skeletons for content layout and spinners only for short indeterminate waits.

name: Keyboard Focus
guideline: Every interactive element needs a visible focus state.

name: Responsive Tables
column4: prioritize key columns or convert rows into cards.
